data.title: Remove tdd-workflow skill and all references
data.description: Delete plugins/dso/skills/tdd-workflow/ directory and .claude/commands/tdd-workflow.md. Remove all tdd-workflow references from 14 files: CLAUDE.md, check-skill-refs.sh, test-qualify-skill-refs.sh, evals.json (3 entries), fix-bug/SKILL.md, using-lockpick/SKILL.md, using-lockpick/HOOK-INJECTION.md, architect-foundation/SKILL.md, CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md, dso-config.example.conf, dso-config.conf, examples/CLAUDE.md.example, .test-index. Atomic task — splitting breaks Gate 2.
